use_cases: Displaying travel destinations and locations in a visually appealing card format
Showing property locations in real estate listings
Creating interactive location discovery sections in travel apps
Featuring venue or event locations in media platforms
ai_summary: A location card component with hover animations, image display, and call-to-action for location-based content. Features smooth Framer Motion animations including scale, translate, and icon slide effects on hover. Designed for showcasing destinations with a clean, modern aesthetic.
